pr.title: Non-record: Looped Transformer + LoRA + Skip Connections + NorMuon + SWA + Int6 + Sliding Window

output.summary: Looped 5-block transformer uses per-virtual-layer LoRA and skip connections to span 30 virtual layers while training with NorMuon and Int6 quantization plus sliding-window eval.
techniques: Looped transformer with per-virtual-layer LoRA, skip connections, and resid mixing to differentiate 30 virtual layers
NorMuon optimizer with wallclock-aware warmdown, SWA, and gradient clipping for deep recurrence stability
Int6 weights with fp16 embedding/LoRA passthrough plus stride-64 sliding-window evaluation
